steps.title: Write equations for counts and cost
steps.content:
Let $n$ be the number of novels and $m$ be the number of magazines. The total number of items and total cost give:
$$n+m=14$$
$$5n+m=34$$

steps.title: Subtract to eliminate magazines
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second:
$$(5n+m)-(n+m)=34-14$$
$$4n=20$$
